title: Delicate Turkish Chicken Stir-fry
description: A light yet rich stir-fry that blends Turkish flavors with a sweet hoisin glaze, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat the kadhai over medium heat and add olive oil.
Add sliced onion and garlic, sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Add sliced red pepper and cook for 2 minutes.
Add diced chicken breast, season with salt and pepper, and cook until browned on all sides.
Drizzle hoisin sauce over the chicken and stir to coat evenly.
Pour in lemon juice, reduce heat, and simmer for 5 to 7 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Add dried dill and chopped parsley, stir to combine.
Serve immediately over a bed of rice or noodles.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
